_note: Post to X with automatic OAuth2 token refresh. Reads the rotating token from the x_oauth/x_token record, refreshes when near expiry (public client — client_id in body, no secret), PERSISTS the rotated refresh token, then posts. Wrapped as the 'broadcast_x_auto' flow-tool. Key finding: api-call form bodies do NOT auto-quote {{vars}} (external tools do), and {{secret:}} does NOT resolve in api-call headers — hence the public-client design.
name: X Post (auto-refresh)

config.script: const m=(input.tok&&input.tok.metadata)||{};function real(v){if(v===undefined||v===null)return '';if(typeof v==='string'){if(v==='')return '';if(v.indexOf('PASTE_')===0)return '';}return v;}const rt=real(m.refreshToken)||real(m.refreshtoken)||'';const at=real(m.accessToken)||real(m.accesstoken)||'';const cid=real(m.clientId)||real(m.clientid)||'';const exp=Number(m.expiresAt||m.expiresat||0);const now=Date.now();const need=(!at)||(now>=(exp-120000));return {need:need,refreshToken:rt,accessToken:at,clientId:cid};
